nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Appleby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from any of various places, for example in Leicestershire, Lincolnshire, and Cumbria, named from Old English æppel or Old Norse epli ‘apple’ + Old Norse bȳ ‘farm’.

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Walter De Appleby II was born about 1200, in Appleby Magna, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William De Appleby I, was 26 and his mother, Mrs. William de Appleby, was 21. He had at least 1 son. He died in 1280, in his hometown, at the age of 81.

Il a eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1280, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 81 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Walter De Appleby II(이)가 대략 1200년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 애플레비 매그나에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William De Appleby I(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. William de Appleby(은)는 21세였다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1280년 그의 고향에서 81세의 나이로 사망했다.
